race.comment: ACTUALITY (7) would take a bit of beating if she brings her best. The first up run at Flemington was solid, getting back and working home well in a bunched finish to be beaten two lengths into seventh. That was on wet ground, fancy she gets better conditions here and this does look very winnable from a soft gate. DRONE ATTACK (9) outran her SP in town last time, have to respect off that run. NOT SURPRISED (6) is lightly raced and suited out to 1200m now. Drawn well for Stackhouse and projects to run a new peak. CLAYMORE MINE (1) was hard to miss first up and wouldn't have to improve much to be right in the finish.
